tier: Tier 7.4d - Cost-Aware Policy/Action Held-Out/Public Usefulness Contract
claim: Tier 7.4d predeclared the held-out/public usefulness scoring contract for the frozen v2.4 cost-aware policy/action baseline. It locks public/real-ish action-cost families, actions, costs, splits, baselines, shams, statistics, pass/fail criteria, and artifacts before any v2.4 held-out scoring.
caveat: Contract-only evidence; not a scoring run, not public usefulness proof, not broad anomaly or predictive-maintenance superiority, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
